title: Cute Cauldrons
description: Because even cauldrons deserve a cozy glow-up — adding warm tones, richer metal details, and soft depth while keeping the vanilla charm intact.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8a5022e6fdbf6b858cfd2b6c8f5922c9407c84a.png)


> Because even cauldrons deserve to feel warm and welcoming.

Are you tired of those cold, flat vanilla cauldrons that look like they belong in a dungeon instead of your cozy base?
Yeah… they could use some love.

Cozy Cauldrons is a small, detailed resource pack that redesigns Minecraft’s cauldrons to look more polished, textured, and атмосферic. Softer metal shading, subtle highlights, improved depth, and warmer tones make them feel like they actually belong in a lived-in home, a witch’s cottage, or a comfy medieval kitchen.

Now your brewing corner won’t feel industrial — it’ll feel intentional.

Perfect for:

- 🧪 Brewing rooms that actually feel magical
- 🏡 Cottagecore and cozy survival builds
- 🕯 Medieval or fantasy interiors
- 🌙 Soft, atmospheric modpacks
- ✨ Players who love small but meaningful details

## 💡 Features
- Redesigned cauldron texture with improved depth and metal detailing
- Warmer, more immersive look while staying true to vanilla style
- Subtle shading improvements for better lighting with shaders
- Lightweight and clean — no unnecessary changes

## 🧵 Compatibility
- Works on all recent Minecraft versions that support resource packs
- Fully compatible with shaders
- Compatible with most texture packs that don’t modify cauldrons

## 💌 Credits
Made with warmth, pixels, and the belief that even the simplest blocks deserve personality.

Enjoy the cozy vibes — and maybe brew something nice while you’re at it.
